cases.prompt: Create a premium fashion ecommerce navbar. Layout: Logo centered. Left side: Women, Men, Accessories. Right side: Search icon, Wishlist icon, Cart icon, Account icon. Cart: on hover show mini-cart dropdown aligned right edge with product image, name, size, quantity selector, remove button, subtotal, View Cart and Checkout buttons. Account: if logged out show Login/Register; if logged in show dropdown with Profile, Orders, Addresses, Logout. Make navbar transparent over hero and solid white after scroll.

Create a dashboard navbar for a SaaS product builder. Layout: Left: Sidebar toggle icon. Next: Workspace switcher dropdown. Center: Breadcrumb navigation. Right: Search input, Notifications bell with red badge and unread count, Help icon, User avatar. Notification dropdown: latest 5 notifications with timestamp. User avatar dropdown: Profile, Billing, API Keys, Logout. Sticky with subtle border bottom.

Build an RTL ecommerce navbar. Layout right to left: Logo on right corner. Categories next to logo. Left side: Search, Wishlist, Cart, Account. Cart: slide-in drawer from left (RTL). Items with price in AED. Checkout button at bottom fixed. Account dropdown: My Orders, Addresses, Profile, Logout in Arabic.

Create a navbar with mega menu. Hover on Women: 4-column layout. Column 1: Categories list. Column 2: New arrivals. Column 3: Best sellers. Column 4: Large featured campaign image with CTA button. Cart icon on far right with item count bubble. Clicking cart opens right-side drawer. Orders page accessible from Account dropdown only.

Design a mobile-first navbar. Top bar: Left: Hamburger menu. Center: Logo. Right: Cart icon with badge. Cart: clicking opens bottom sheet with items, subtotal, checkout button. Hamburger: full screen overlay, categories expandable accordion, Account section at bottom with Orders, Profile, Logout.

Create an ultra minimal navbar. Only show: Logo center, Menu items spaced evenly, Small cart icon far right. No visible borders. Hover effect: subtle underline animation left to right. Cart opens elegant dropdown with fade animation. Orders link NOT visible unless user is logged in.

Create a marketplace navbar. Left: Logo. Next: Search bar large width. Right: Become a Seller button, Orders (direct top-level link), Cart, User avatar. Cart dropdown must show seller name for each item.

Create a navbar for AI website builder. Left: Logo + Project name editable field. Center: Device preview toggle (Desktop/Tablet/Mobile). Right: Publish button primary, Share button, Notifications, Account. Account dropdown: My Projects, Team Members, Billing, Logout. When not logged in replace Publish with Sign Up.

Create a dark navbar for streetwear brand. Left: Logo. Center: Shop, Drops, Lookbook. Right: Search, Cart, Account. Cart: hover show mini cart with bold typography, large product thumbnail. Orders accessible only from Account dropdown. Add smooth hover glitch effect on menu links.

Build a navbar that changes based on user role. Guest: Logo, Shop, Cart, Login. Logged in customer: Logo, Shop, Orders, Cart, Account dropdown. Admin: Logo, Dashboard, Manage Products, Orders, Account dropdown. Cart icon must always stay top-right corner. Sticky with scroll shadow.
